title: The Unsolved Disappearance of the Beaumont Children

scenes.text: Three siblings vanished from a beach, and their fate remains a mystery.
It happened at Glenelg Beach, Adelaide.
On January 26, 1966, the Beaumont children were last seen playing at the beach.
Despite extensive searches, their whereabouts remain unknown.
Numerous theories have emerged, but none have provided answers.
scenes.label: NO ANSWERS FOUND

scenes.text: Follow if you'd have cracked this one.

description: 📍 Adelaide, Australia - 1966. Three siblings vanished from a beach, and their mystery endures to this day. Follow for daily cold cases!
